data.name: Curse of Kisera
data.detailed_description:
Contents

Story erotic 8 kinds (21 kinds of basic CG with animation)
Monster defeat erotic animation 16 kinds (basic CG 16 kinds)
Monster erotic attack (3D) 16 kinds

Situations


  • Being tricked by the village chief...
  • Being tricked by a doctor...
  • Gang-rape by a sailor
  • The fat guy who is disgusting and makes me feel good...
  • A boy who wants to be a girl...
  • Sending erotic pictures with a smartphone
  • Hetero rape, monster defeat
  • Deliveries

  • Pregnancy, bloat
  • Semen in the uterus with a bloated belly
  • Delicatessen while pregnant
  • Pregnancy, black nipples

  • Dress-up
  • NPC's reaction changes when you talk to them naked or in naughty clothes.
  • A full sex history. The amount of semen ejaculated by the first partner, previous partners, and each partner.
  • Cumulative amount of cum ejaculated in your lifetime

It can be cleared as a virgin (which will cause a slight change in the script).

Play time

2 to 3 hours?

data.short_description: Monster Party RPG. 3D RPG+2D Novel ADV. Berry, a girl who can impregnate monster children, leaves her hometown to solve the mystery of her constitution.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Inten Core i5, AMD Ryzen5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1080
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Inten Core i7, AMD Ryzen7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
